code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut current = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  mut negative = false
  mut i = 0

  while i <= n
    let b = if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      32
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if has_digit
        let val = if negative
          -current
        else
          current
        end
        product = product * val
        current = 0
        has_digit = false
        negative = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      negative = true
    else if b == 43
      negative = false
    else
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println("product=#{product}")
end
